---
title: "SLAM-Seq mapping statistics (SLAM-seq test)"
author: "Inés Rivero-García"
date: "9/22/2023"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    number_sections: true
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
---

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2)

# set project root for the notebook
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/Volumes/INTENSO/PhD/cardio_slamseq/")

data_path <- "data"
fig_path  <- "figures/01_preprocessing"
```

```{r prep_data, include=FALSE}
df <- read.csv(file.path(data_path, "metadata.csv"),
                 header = TRUE, 
                 sep = "\t")

df <- df[df$Experimental_batch == "0 (06/06/2022)",]
colors <- c("#BBBBBB", "#FA8072", "#FF0800", "#420D09") 
names(colors) <- unique(df$Sample)

df$Sample <- factor(df$Sample, levels = c("Null_0", "6hours", "12hours", "24hours"))
```

# Alignment statistics (STAR)
```{r nrRawReads}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrRawReads.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_reads, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 160), 
                     breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100, 125, 150)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Number of raw reads (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r UniquelyMappedReads}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
              #"AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrUniquelyMappingReads.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_uniquely_mapped_reads/10^6,
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 160), 
                     breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100, 125, 150)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Nr uniquely mapped reads (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```

```{r UniquelyMappedReadsPercent}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
              #"AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentageUniquelyMappingReads.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_uniquely_mapped_reads,
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), 
                     breaks = c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Percentage of uniquely mapped reads") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r MultiMappedReads}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrMultimappingReads.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_multimapping_reads/10^6, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15), 
                     breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Nr multi-mapping reads (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r MultiMappedReadsPercent}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentageMultimappingReads.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_multimapping_reads, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), 
                     breaks = c(0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Percentage of multi-mapping reads") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r TooManyLoci}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrReadsTooManyLoci.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_reads_mapping_too_many_loci/10^6, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), 
                     breaks = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Nr unmapped reads (too many loci) (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r TooManyLociPercentage}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentageReadsTooManyLoci.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_reads_mapping_too_many_loci, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), 
                     breaks = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Percentage of unmapped reads\n(too many loci)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r MismatchesUnmapped}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrReadsTooManyMismatches.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_unmaped_reads_mismatches/10^6,
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.03), 
                     breaks = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Nr unmapped reads\n(too many mismatches) (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r MismatchesUnmappedPercent}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentageReadsTooManyMismatches.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_unmapped_reads_mismatches,
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), 
                     breaks = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Percentage of unmapped reads\n(too many mismatches)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r ShortUnmapped}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrReadsTooShort.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_unmaped_reads_short/10^6, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5)+
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3), 
                     breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Nr unmapped reads\n(too short) (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r ShortUnmappedPercent}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentReadsTooShort.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_unmapped_reads_short, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), 
                     breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Percentage of unmapped reads\n(too short)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r OtherUnmapped}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrReadsUnmappedOtherReasons.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Nr_unmapped_reads_other/10^6, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Nr unmapped reads\n(other reasons) (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r OtherUnmappedPercent}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentageReadsUnmappedOtherReasons.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_unmapped_reads_other, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Percentage of unmapped reads\n(other reasons)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
```{r StackedNrReads}
Stacked_Reads_DF <- df[, c("Sample", 
                           "Nr_uniquely_mapped_reads", 
                          "Nr_multimapping_reads",
                          "Nr_reads_mapping_too_many_loci",
                          "Nr_unmaped_reads_mismatches",
                          "Nr_unmaped_reads_short",
                          "Nr_unmapped_reads_other")]
Stacked_Reads_DF <- reshape2::melt(Stacked_Reads_DF)

#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_NrReadsPerCategory.pdf"), 
#    width = 5, height = 3)

ggplot(Stacked_Reads_DF, aes(x = Sample, 
                             y = value, 
                             fill = variable)) + 
  geom_bar(position="stack", 
           stat="identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Purples", 
                    direction = -1,
                    labels = c("Uniquely mapping", 
                               "Multi-mapping",
                               "Unmaped: too many loci",
                               "Unmaped: too many mismatches",
                               "Unmapped: too short",
                               "Unmapped: other reasons"))+
  ylab("Number of reads (Millions)") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
#dev.off()
```
```{r StackedNrReadsPercent}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_PercentageReadsPerCategory.pdf"), 
#    width = 5, height = 3)

ggplot(Stacked_Reads_DF, aes(x = Sample, 
                             y = value, 
                             fill = variable)) + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Purples", 
                    direction = -1,
                    labels = c("Uniquely mapping", 
                               "Multi-mapping",
                               "Unmaped: too many loci",
                               "Unmaped: too many mismatches",
                               "Unmapped: too short",
                               "Unmapped: other reasons"))+
  ylab("Proportion of reads") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
#dev.off()
```
```{r MismatchPerBase}
#pdf(file.path(fig_path,
#              "AlignedReads_SlamSeqTest_MismatchRatePerBase.pdf"), 
#    width = 3, height = 3)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Sample, 
               y = Percent_mismatch_per_base, 
               fill = Sample, 
               color = Sample)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           width = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("% mismatches per nucleotide") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```
